assumptions: Spot shock supplied as -7% and converted to -0.07 in the calculation sheet.
Vol shock supplied as +4 points and converted to 0.04.
Rate shock is supplied as +50 bp, but the packet also supplies rate_pnl directly, so the workbook uses the direct rate PnL.
